channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Countdown Board in Bus shelter 0123 0107 at bus stop Y Bromley Road / Lewisham Town Hall towards Beckenham Or Downham : still showing Bus stop closed yet buses are stopping after road works ended 10 days ago, 9th May
item.description:
Countdown Board in Bus shelter 0123 0107 at bus stop Y Bromley Road / Lewisham Town Hall towards Beckenham Or Downham : still showing Bus stop closed yet buses are stopping after road works ended 10 days ago See photographs Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Rubbsih

item.title: Fair amount of glass in the gutter, 9th May
item.description:
Location approximate as phone signal is utterly useless up the hill but as close as I can match to the geotag on the photo.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter around clothe recycling bin, 9th May
item.description:
There is litter around the clothes recycling bin (Scopes) located on Tabard Street. It has been there for three days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin with no lid + flytipping, 9th May
item.description:
The people who live at St David’s Mansion on Dunstans Road (se22) keep removing the lid off their bins and overfilling them. This results in rubbish flying all over our street. Can we please get the current mess sorted out, replace the bins and ultimately fine residents for fly tipping if this continues?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dawson's Hill Footpath (Dunstan's Road to Ladlands), East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall and bench, 9th May
item.description:
Graffiti and bird poo on wall and bench

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Allotments track, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pile of rubble left over from pavement repairs, 9th May
item.description:
Large pile of rubble left over from pavement repairs making it difficult to turn into Alpine Copse. This is forcing large vehicles to mount the opposite pavement and damage that too! Rubble has been here over 2 weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alpine Copse, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Fridge dumped in bushes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Invicta Close, Elmstead, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kimpton Road, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Street Lighting, 9th May
item.description:
Street light not working in alleyway between Beechwood Rise and Green lane Chislehurst
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beechwood Rise, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree requires substantial pruning, 9th May
item.description:
The tree is now substantially overhanging the boundary. I asked last year for it to be pruned and it was not. I am now legally allowed to prune the overhanging branches. I will give the Council another opportunity to do so or I will instruct a tree service to do this who may remove more than you want. So please now prune it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 184, Welling Way, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead pigeon on footpath, 9th May
item.description:
As above
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crossing Well Road and Christchurch Hill, 9th May
item.description:
BT Box (or other utility box provider) is about to fall over.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Well Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked Garbage Chute on all floors, 9th May
item.description:
The garbage chute doesnt drop the bins down to the bottom, its clogged.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frampton Park Road, Hackney, London
